summary: Comprehensive BookkeepAI System Analysis - Transaction Display Issues

critical_findings.description: API successfully returns 615 transactions but frontend filtering logic removes all transactions from display
evidence: Server logs show 'Found 615 transactions' and successful API responses
Users can login successfully but see empty transaction table
Filter button works but no data displays
likely_causes: autoUpdates filter mismatch between UI options and filtering logic
Transaction interface mismatch with API response structure
Boolean/string comparison issues in filter conditions

critical_findings.description: Automated testing cannot login despite manual login working
evidence: Automated tests fail with navigation timeouts
API endpoints return 401 when accessed without proper session

fixes_implemented.description: Filter was being counted as active but not actually filtering transactions

fixes_implemented.fix: Fixed TypeScript error for isMerged property
fixes_implemented.description: Added type casting to resolve compilation error
Added comprehensive console logging to track data flow
Resolved 'Cannot access activeFilterCount before initialization' error

current_debugging.description: Track when Transactions component initializes and with what filters
Detailed logging of each filter step and results
Log each transaction as it attempts to render

next_steps.action: Wait for user manual test results
next_steps.description: User will test transactions page manually and provide console output
Review filtering logs to identify exact filter causing issue

next_steps.action: Verify Transaction interface matches API response
next_steps.description: Ensure TypeScript interface aligns with actual API data structure

monitoring_points: Console logs for '🚀 Transactions component mounted'
Console logs for '✅ Final filtered results'
